itwac.description: ItWaC web corpus, lemma-aware (franfranz/Word_Frequency_Lists_ITA). Combined noun+verb+adjective files; auxiliaries and function words excluded by upstream preprocessing.

opensubs.description: OpenSubtitles 2018 Italian (hermitdave/FrequencyWords it_50k.txt), wordform counts lemmatised via simplemma and aggregated per lemma.

wordfreq.description: wordfreq Python library, multi-corpus aggregate (Wikipedia + news + books + subtitles + web + Twitter). The freq_wordfreq value is the native fraction returned by wordfreq.word_frequency() summed across the lemma's surface forms. Multiply by 1e6 for frequency-per-million if useful.

hermitdave.description: OpenSubtitles 2018 Italian, raw wordform counts (hermitdave/FrequencyWords it_50k.txt). Surface-form level — not lemmatised.

orgtre.description: OpenSubtitles 2018 Italian, cleaned (orgtre/top-open-subtitles-sentences). Surface-form level — not lemmatised. Tokenisation differs slightly from hermitdave.

wikipedia.description: Italian Wikipedia, October 2022 dump (adno/wikipedia-word-frequency-clean). Lemmatised per-form via simplemma and aggregated per lemma for the lemma CSV; raw wordform counts in the form CSV.

news.description: OPUS News-Commentary v16, Italian monolingual. Lemmatised via simplemma.

lip.description: OPUS Europarl v8, Italian monolingual — PROXY for spoken Italian (formal transcribed parliamentary speech). The real LIP/BADIP corpus wasn't reachable at build time; swap when available.

literature.description: Sample of Italian Project Gutenberg books (79 texts, classic literature). Lemmatised via simplemma.
